title: Kaji and amp Shinji
wikitext:
[]: Kaji &amp Shinji             Quote Post by remix220 » Thu Aug 06, 2009 3:11 pm Seems they pulled the part outta the manga where Shinji is sitting by the soda vendors somewhere in the NERV facility. I found it a bit interesting how they they made this scene. Kaji buys Shinji the drink, and walks up behind him putting the cold soda on his cheek, to surprise him. Then, Kaji grabs Shinji's hand, and leans in towards him... It was a very... interesting played out part. [URL=http://img5.imageshack.us/i/vlcsnap2009080616h06m56.jpg/] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Aug 06, 2009 3:18 pm Ryouji: How going out for tea with me? Shinji: I'm a guy.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Aug 06, 2009 3:34 pm ya but don't tell anyone alright?

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Thu Aug 06, 2009 3:39 pm I believe Chaz is the only one who has ever captured Kaji's true nature

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Aug 06, 2009 3:49 pm Axell wrote: I believe Chaz is the only one who has ever captured Kaji's true nature

[]:             Quote Post by backseatjesus » Thu Aug 06, 2009 3:54 pm Kaji would do anything for and to children.

[]:             Quote Post by remix220 » Thu Aug 06, 2009 4:02 pm backseatjesus wrote: Kaji would do anything for and to children.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Aug 06, 2009 4:04 pm remix220 wrote: backseatjesus wrote: Kaji would do anything for and to children.

[]:             Quote Post by remix220 » Thu Aug 06, 2009 4:06 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: I wouldn't say that Shinji's emotional state is screwed in Rebuild, at least not yet.

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Thu Aug 06, 2009 5:06 pm Axell. What the hell. You haven't shared your Display Picture with the rest of the world. WHAT THE HELL MAN?

[]:             Quote Post by skikes » Thu Aug 06, 2009 5:13 pm yeah that scene was pretty hawt... im so gay for Kaji. lucky Shinji ~_~

[]:             Quote Post by remix220 » Thu Aug 06, 2009 5:57 pm skikes wrote: yeah that scene was pretty hawt... im so gay for Kaji. lucky Shinji ~_~

[]:             Quote Post by trueno_twentyone » Thu Aug 06, 2009 6:34 pm Kaji's just trippin'

[]:             Quote Post by remix220 » Thu Aug 06, 2009 8:36 pm trueno_twentyone wrote: Kaji's just trippin'

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Aug 06, 2009 8:48 pm I was in shock when I saw something about to happen and then I laughed in relief when Kaji only tricked Shinji by going up to his ear. Right?

[]:             Quote Post by trueno_twentyone » Thu Aug 06, 2009 9:11 pm sometimes, it's good to play another role...

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Fri Aug 07, 2009 4:46 am i find this scence and the scence form the series where Kaji "advances" on Shinji there for a. comic relief and b. to emphasize how sexual of a being Kaji is also Kaji:Can i buy you a drink Shinji: YOU CAN NOT ADVANCE see, i found out the reason for the title

[]:             Quote Post by Duskbyday » Fri Aug 07, 2009 5:15 am Funny, everytime Kaji and Misato aren't with each other they seem to take a liking to Shinji! Kaji you playar! ;D

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Fri Aug 07, 2009 12:16 pm wonderluster wrote: Axell. What the hell. You haven't shared your Display Picture with the rest of the world. WHAT THE HELL MAN?

[]:             Quote Post by carla » Fri Aug 07, 2009 12:34 pm funniest thing about this whole Kaji/Shinji thing is the scene right after, when they're in Kaji's watermelon garden/patch place, and Kaji tells him he has to earn his pay... and Shinji goes: "you mean the coffee? when you said 'date'... i thought you were a more serious person than that." poor Shinji was so disappointed that Kaji was only using him as manual labor for his fruit garden... and for some reason that last phrase sounded so wrong to my ears, on so many levels...
